creator: donner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to shamsher from comment #0)

May I ask you to provide a bit more complete example, what you are doing and expecting.

> ipfw add 2500 pipe tablearg sockarg out

will use the SO_USER_COOKIE socket option (Which one? How do you set it?) to select a dummynet pipe instance (Which ones are defined? May you please provide the config?)

How do you notice, that the desired action did not occur? Which commands are you using for this test and what is the real response?
